violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hand sink in the production kitchen has a constant leak from the faucet.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the waffle iron station need to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
